'''shanolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thallome|thallome]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-n-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thallome|thallome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shanolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæneleth|shæneleth]] || [[word:shænelej|shænelej]] || [[word:shænelesh|shænelesh]] || [[word:shænele|shænele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shanonoloth|shanonoloth]] || [[word:shanonoloj|shanonoloj]] || [[word:shanonolosh|shanonolosh]] || [[word:shanonolo|shanonolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shanoloth|shanoloth]] || [[word:shanoloj|shanoloj]] || [[word:shanolosh|shanolosh]] || [[word:shanolo|shanolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shanofloth|shanofloth]] || [[word:shanofloj|shanofloj]] || [[word:shanoflosh|shanoflosh]] || [[word:shanoflof|shanoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shanolotho|shanolotho]] || [[word:shanolojo|shanolojo]] || [[word:shanolosho|shanolosho]] || [[word:shanoloko|shanoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shanoloth|shanoloth]] || [[word:shanoloj|shanoloj]] || [[word:shanolosh|shanolosh]] || [[word:shanolo|shanolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shanolothol|shanolothol]] || [[word:shanolojol|shanolojol]] || [[word:shanoloshol|shanoloshol]] || [[word:shanolokol|shanolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shanolothotho|shanolothotho]] || [[word:shanolojojo|shanolojojo]] || [[word:shanoloshosho|shanoloshosho]] || [[word:shanoloko|shanoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shanolothon|shanolothon]] || [[word:shanolojon|shanolojon]] || [[word:shanoloshon|shanoloshon]] || [[word:shanolokon|shanolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shanolothoro|shanolothoro]] || [[word:shanolojoro|shanolojoro]] || [[word:shanoloshoro|shanoloshoro]] || [[word:shanolokoro|shanolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
